sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR can reduce the QWen30B MOE update weight speed from 8s to 6s

In this approach, we merge the batch of tensors into a giant tensor (I call it Flattened Tensor in code)
And here is the benchmark for updating QWen 30B MOE with 2 H200s:

Thanks a lot to @fzyzcjy for providing guidance

Implemented circuit-breaker-aware retries with exponential backoff and jitter for the regular router.
Centralized retry orchestration in a reusable executor.
Added metrics and unit tests.
Part of #8917

Config

Added jitter_factor to RetryConfig (defaults to 0.1) in sgl-rout
